product_data.Features: Industry-leading noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, speak-to-chat technology, crystal clear hands-free calling, foldable design

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I came across your listing for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones and I'm quite interested in them. I was wondering if there's any room for negotiation on the price. Looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. I can offer you a special price of $350 for them. What do you think?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer! I have a budget of $176, would you be able to go lower than that?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your offer, but I can't go below the wholesale price of $220 for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. Let me know if you're still interested at that price.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer, but unfortunately, I cannot exceed my budget of $176. If you're able to lower the price within my budget, I would be happy to proceed with the purchase.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget constraints, but I'm unable to sell below the wholesale price of $220 for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. If you're able to reconsider, I'd be happy to assist you with the purchase.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your understanding. I appreciate your offer, but I must adhere to my budget of $176. If you have any future promotions or discounts that could bring the price within my budget, I would be interested.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your interest. I will keep your budget in mind and let you know if there are any future promotions or discounts available for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. Feel free to reach out if you have any further questions.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for considering my budget. I look forward to hearing from you about any future opportunities for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. Have a great day!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Thank you! Have a great day as well!
